title: agropyron smithii var. palmeri
intro: Agropyron smithii var. palmeri, also known as big bluestem, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of big bluestem include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Big bluestem can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for various health benefits, and it is also used in traditional remedies to treat wounds and skin conditions.
